reason: This is a simple hadith quote about the virtue of Friday, commonly shared by regular Muslims. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: قال رسول الله ﷺ «أفضل الأيام عند الله يوم الجمعة» . (صحيح) عن أبي هريرة. صحيح الجامع - 1098 الصحيحة - 1502
